message:
fix: replace bare unwrap() with expect() across codebase, suppress dead_code warnings

Systematic pass replacing .unwrap() with .expect("reason") in ~30 files
where the unwrap was on an infallible path but lacked documentation of
why it cannot fail. Each expect message describes the invariant that
guarantees the value is present.

Affected modules:
- cancel/progress_certificate: validation error message extraction
- cli/completion: added #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] for zsh generator
- combinator/hedge: timer initialization check
- cx/registry: queue non-empty assertion after is_empty guard
- lab/fuzz: best_result existence when updating best_seed
- lab/http: response presence in ordered request arrays
- lab/meta/mutation: region existence for mutation target
- lab/oracle/eprocess: config validation error extraction
- obligation/no_aliasing_proof: active obligation existence for transfer
- observability: write-to-String infallibility
- raptorq: slice-to-array conversion and solution existence
- runtime: various registration and scheduler invariants
- trace: span and event formatting
- types/wasm_abi, web/compress, web/extract, stream/zip: minor

Also: #[allow(dead_code)] added to ObservableGauge fields in otel.rs
that are retained for their Drop-registered metric callbacks.

http_client.rs: added #[allow(clippy::large_futures)] for the redirect
chase future.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -261,6 +261,7 @@ fn generate_bash_completions<W: Write, C: Completable>(
     Ok(())
 }
 
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
 fn generate_zsh_completions<W: Write, C: Completable>(
     completable: &C,
     writer: &mut W,

@@ -345,7 +345,7 @@ fn mutation_obligation_leak(harness: &mut MetaHarness) {
         .runtime
         .state
         .region(region)
-        .unwrap()
+        .expect("region must exist to be mutated")
         .set_state(crate::record::region::RegionState::Closed);
     harness
         .oracles

@@ -583,11 +583,13 @@ impl MetricsExporter for InMemoryExporter {
 #[derive(Clone)]
 pub struct OtelMetrics {
     // Task metrics
+    #[allow(dead_code)]
     tasks_active: ObservableGauge<u64>,
     tasks_spawned: Counter<u64>,
     tasks_completed: Counter<u64>,
     task_duration: Histogram<f64>,
     // Region metrics
+    #[allow(dead_code)]
     regions_active: ObservableGauge<u64>,
     regions_created: Counter<u64>,
     regions_closed: Counter<u64>,
@@ -605,6 +607,7 @@ pub struct OtelMetrics {
     checkpoint_interval: Histogram<f64>,
     task_stuck_detected: Counter<u64>,
     // Obligation metrics
+    #[allow(dead_code)]
     obligations_active: ObservableGauge<u64>,
     obligations_created: Counter<u64>,
     obligations_discharged: Counter<u64>,
